message:
feat: add network surface example and expand runtime tests

Add examples/ex_network_surface.c demonstrating network subsystem usage.
Extend runtime unit tests (+43 lines) with additional lifecycle scenarios.
Update examples smoke test script.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@ EXAMPLE_SOURCES=(
     ex_quickstart.c
     ex_cancel_drain.c
     ex_channel_flow.c
+    ex_network_surface.c
     ex_timeout_deadline.c
     ex_lab_replay.c
 )
